backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex grid trading bot with configurable interval, spread, and order count; manages open/history order maps, an activity log, and a timer-driven loop that places and cancels limit orders on the ICP/ckUSDT pair.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the BotControlPanel frontend feature (running/stopped state and order placement error surfacing) to its relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the Vite/TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the sticky header, live-trading banner, responsive dashboard grid of all panel components, and a footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: Activity log panel that polls the backend, displays up to 50 entries in reverse-chronological order with color-coded event-type badges, and supports manual refresh.
Bot control panel showing RUNNING/STOPPED status, Start/Stop buttons with loading states, grid capital estimator, and dismissible alert sections for order placement errors and cancellations sourced from the activity log and trade history.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: A React panel component for viewing and editing bot configuration fields (interval, spread, orders) with validation, save feedback, and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays the last computed grid orders (buy/sell) in a scrollable table with loading skeletons, error state, and a manual refresh button.
Shows the live ICP/ckUSDT mid price with LIVE/STALE/ERROR status indicators, a relative-time ticker, and a manual refresh button.
Renders currently open exchange orders sorted by price with buy/sell count badges, loading skeletons, error handling, and a refresh control.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: Displays historical trade records sorted by timestamp with status badges (OPEN/FILLED/CANCELLED), loading skeletons, and error/empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous IC backend actor via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including bot status, config, market price, grid preview, trade history, and open orders, with adaptive polling intervals based on bot running state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a terminal-themed dark design system using Tailwind, JetBrains Mono font, OKLCH color tokens for trading semantics (buy/sell/running/stopped), and custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, terminal-specific box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the ICDex Grid Bot's existing features and pending automated grid trading feature requests (AR-1 through AR-4) covering backend grid logic, timer loop, open orders query, and frontend bot control panel updates.
